_note: Single source of truth for Izir boons/banes. Names + descriptions are authored in English (GM directive). Bane rule-element labels use the neutral i18n key SHARDS.Izir.MaskedLabel so hidden prices don't leak their name through roll breakdowns.
_activesNote: PASSIVE boons and PRICE banes below are standard pf2e effects (senses, resistances, weaknesses, flat modifiers, damage dice, reminder notes). The ACTIVE abilities (Void Lash, Umbral Grasp, Izir Wave I/II, Predator's Lunge, Void Step, Rend the Veil, Devour Light, Herald of Ruin, Perfect Stillness) are NEW actions/spells that do not exist in Pathfinder; per GM directive they are authored via the create-spell / create-item skills (full pf2e JSON + Obsidian vault notes) and their output is pasted in here. izir-wave-1 / izir-wave-2 are working action-form SEEDS demonstrating the replacement family until the skill pass finalizes them.

entries.name: Voidsight
entries.description: The black in your eyes drinks the dark. You gain darkvision, and you can sense other bearers of Izir and Izir-touched artifacts within 60 feet (imprecise).

entries.name: Dreams of the Void
entries.description: Sleep opens a door. After daily preparations, attempt a DC 4 flat check; on a failure you are fatigued until you spend 10 minutes communing with Izir — which may itself invite temptation.

rules.title: Dreams of the Void
rules.text: After daily preparations: DC 4 flat check or fatigued until 10 minutes of communion with Izir.

entries.name: Strength of the Void
entries.description: Unnatural power floods your limbs. You gain a +1 status bonus to Athletics and a +5-foot status bonus to your Speed.

entries.name: The Mark Spreads
entries.description: Under stress the black wells up and floods your eyes. You take a -1 circumstance penalty to Diplomacy and Deception against anyone who has seen them.

entries.name: Void Resilience
entries.description: Void becomes a second skin. You gain resistance to void damage equal to half your level.

entries.name: Izir Wave I
entries.description:
You sweep a cone of devouring void from your open hand.

Effect A 15-foot cone deals @Damage[(floor(@actor.level/2))d6[void]] damage; each creature attempts a basic Reflex save against your class DC or spell DC (whichever is higher).

entries.name: Anathema to the Holy
entries.description: The void in you recoils from light and the sacred. You gain weakness 2 to holy damage, and sudden bright light dazzles you for 1 round.

rules.title: Anathema to the Holy
rules.text: Sudden bright light dazzles you for 1 round.

entries.name: Lethality I
entries.description: Your blows carry the hunger of the void. Your Strikes deal an extra 1d6 void damage.

entries.name: Hunger for the Kill
entries.description: When you drop a foe, the void demands you finish it. Attempt a Will save against your temptation DC or you must spend your next action to Strike it (or the nearest hostile). You take a -2 circumstance penalty on nonlethal attacks.

rules.title: Hunger for the Kill
rules.text: On dropping a foe: Will vs temptation DC or compelled to Strike it (or the nearest hostile).

entries.name: Unnatural Vigor
entries.description: The void stitches you back together mid-fight. Once per hour, when you roll initiative, gain temporary Hit Points equal to your level.

rules.title: Unnatural Vigor
rules.text: 1/hour, on rolling initiative: gain temporary HP equal to your level.

entries.name: Izir Wave II
entries.description:
The wave widens into a torrent of annihilation.

Effect A 30-foot cone deals @Damage[(floor(@actor.level/2))d8[void]] damage; each creature attempts a basic Reflex save against your class DC or spell DC (whichever is higher).

entries.name: The Face Fades
entries.description: Your features blur toward something wrong. You take a -2 circumstance penalty to Diplomacy and Deception against strangers, and concealing your nature at close range now requires magic.

entries.name: Anathema to the Holy (Deeper)
entries.description: The holy bites deeper. You gain weakness 4 to holy damage.

entries.name: Grip of the Void
entries.description: Where you wound, the void lingers. Your critical hits deal an extra 1d6 persistent void damage.

entries.name: Whisper in the Blood
entries.description: When your guard breaks, the void slips in. The first time you critically fail a save in combat, you are off-guard until the end of your next turn, and the GM may call for a temptation check.

rules.title: Whisper in the Blood
rules.text: On a critical failure on a save in combat: off-guard until end of your next turn; GM may call a temptation check.

entries.name: Terror's Mantle
entries.description: Dread pours off you like cold. Enemies that enter or begin their turn within 10 feet must succeed at a Will save against your temptation DC or become frightened 1 (once per target per 10 minutes).

entries.name: Slipping Control
entries.description: The first time you are bloodied each combat, attempt a Will save against your temptation DC or be compelled to Strike the nearest creature (allies included) for 1 round. While below half Hit Points, you are doomed 1.

rules.title: Slipping Control
rules.text: First time bloodied each combat: Will vs temptation DC or compelled to Strike the nearest creature (allies included) for 1 round. Doomed 1 while below half HP.

entries.name: Izir Does Not Let Go
entries.description: The void refuses to release its vessel. Once per day, when you would be reduced to 0 Hit Points, you stay at 1 Hit Point instead.

rules.title: Izir Does Not Let Go
rules.text: 1/day: when reduced to 0 HP, stay at 1 HP instead.

entries.name: Anathema to the Holy (Profound)
entries.description: The sacred is agony. You gain weakness 6 to holy damage.

entries.name: The Body Betrays
entries.description: The void reshapes your flesh into something visibly wrong. Only magic can disguise it; you take a -2 circumstance penalty to Diplomacy and Deception against those who are not Nameless, and wards against Izir always detect you.

entries.name: Lethality II
entries.description: The hunger is a torrent. Your Strikes deal an extra 2d6 void damage, and when you drop a foe, adjacent enemies are frightened 1.

rules.title: Lethality II
rules.text: When you drop a foe, adjacent enemies are frightened 1.

entries.name: The Voice of Izir
entries.description: It speaks now, and part of you always listens. You are permanently stupefied 1 and doomed 1. This is the last step before the fall.

rules.title: The Voice of Izir
rules.text: Permanent stupefied 1 and doomed 1 while immersed at this depth.

entries.name: Sovereign Will
entries.description: You are the master now, not the mastered. You are immune to void damage and to Izir's compulsions, and you gain a +1 status bonus to Will saves.

packEffects.name: Izir's Terror
packEffects.description: The void presses close. You are frightened 1 (Will save against the bearer's temptation DC negates).

rules.title: Izir's Terror
rules.text: Frightened 1 unless you succeed at a Will save against the bearer's temptation DC.
